commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A human maintainer needs to accept the intentional gateway default compatibility change; no narrow ClawSweeper repair remains from the code review.; Cleared: The diff changes memory config resolution, tests, and docs only; it does not add dependency, CI, secret, permission, or code-execution surface. (sha=624702efe751bc03a3e2d6c639367a07b3f9e4cf)
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes unset `memorySearch.sync.watch` to resolve false for default-purpose gateway memory managers while preserving explicit values and transient CLI/status manager behavior, with tests and docs updated.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +131, Docs +3. Total +170 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main and v2026.5.28 resolve unset `sync.watch` to true, while the PR tests show gateway mode resolving it false for default managers. I did not run the long-lived FD scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A human maintainer needs to accept the intentional gateway default compatibility change; no narrow ClawSweeper repair remains from the code review.

target.title: fix(memory): default gateway memory watch off
target.body:
## Summary

- Default unset `memorySearch.sync.watch` to `false` for long-lived gateway-mode memory managers.
- Keep explicit `sync.watch: true` / `false` authoritative, and preserve CLI/status transient defaults.
- Thread purpose-aware sync resolution through builtin and QMD manager creation, then update config help/docs.

Fixes #71335.

## Related Issues And PRs

- #71335 is the exact issue this PR addresses: unset `memorySearch.sync.watch` still resolved to enabled for gateway memory manager paths.
- #81802 is related FD-pressure work that removed chokidar write-stability polling. It reduced watcher polling FD pressure but intentionally did not change the gateway default policy.
- #86701 is related FD-pressure work that avoids macOS/Windows per-file watcher fan-out for memory directories. It reduces per-manager watcher cost, but unset gateway managers still allocate watchers unless this default changes.
- #86293 was a related runtime idle-eviction mitigation for long-running gateway daemons. It bounded manager lifetime, but it was closed and explicitly left the `sync.watch` default out of scope.
- #64654 was an older extraPaths watcher recursion PR surfaced by search. It is adjacent to memory watcher coverage, not the headless gateway default-policy change.
- #64549 remains separate: it tracks watch auto-indexing behavior for new files, not the gateway default resource policy.
- #86613, #77327, and #78224 describe the same FD-pressure family that motivated #81802/#86701; those fixes lower watcher cost but do not make unset gateway watchers conservative.
- #40389 is related lifecycle cleanup context used by the idle-eviction mitigation, not this default-resolution fix.


## Release Note Context

Gateway deployments that currently rely on implicit file-change memory indexing with unset `memorySearch.sync.watch` must set `sync.watch: true` to keep that live watcher behavior. The new unset default is intentionally conservative for long-running gateway managers to reduce watcher FD pressure; local CLI/desktop-style defaults and explicit watch settings are unchanged.

## Behavior

- Unset `sync.watch`, no `gateway.mode`: `true` as before.
- Unset `sync.watch`, `gateway.mode: "local"` or `"remote"`, default/long-lived manager: `false`.
- Explicit `sync.watch: true`: `true`, including gateway mode.
- Explicit `sync.watch: false`: `false`, including gateway mode.
- CLI/status purposes still resolve unset watch to `true`, and those managers remain transient/no persistent watchers.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/memory-search.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager.watcher-config.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/search-manager.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/memory-search.ts src/agents/memory-search.test.ts src/config/types.tools.ts src/config/schema.help.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/search-manager.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/manager.watcher-config.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts docs/concepts/memory-builtin.md docs/reference/memory-config.md`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode commit --commit HEAD`
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
